overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through Night City's neon-lit commercial district. The player approaches an NCPD police checkpoint, crosses the street while admiring towering skyscrapers covered in holographic advertisements, and continues along palm-lined sidewalks past food vendors.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial walkway with vending machines

events.description: moving past illuminated yellow vending machines and large digital billboards
slowing down as approaching NCPD police checkpoint ahead

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered sidewalk past neon-lit vending machines and advertisements

notable_agents.action: NCPD officer standing guard near the police vehicle

entered.detail: illuminated yellow vending machines with digital displays and glowing panels
massive screen displaying colorful animated advertisements on building facade
black police SUV with blue neon caution lights and NCPD markings
tall palm trees with illuminated trunks lining the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: Walking along a covered commercial sidewalk lined with glowing yellow vending machines and massive digital billboards. The camera approaches an NCPD police vehicle parked ahead with officers standing nearby, while palm trees line the right side of the walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: NCPD security checkpoint on commercial street

events.description: pedestrian in dark clothing crosses close to camera near the checkpoint
turning right to cross the street away from the checkpoint

agents.ego_description: navigating around the NCPD checkpoint and preparing to cross the street

notable_agents.action: police officer standing guard next to the NCPD vehicle with rifle
pedestrian in cap and jacket walking past camera closely

entered.detail: orange and white striped barriers blocking part of the sidewalk
small brown food vendor kiosk with illuminated menu displays

segments.scene_description: At the NCPD checkpoint, the camera navigates around police officers and orange barriers. Pedestrians walk past in various directions, including one passing very close to the camera. The scene transitions from the covered walkway to the open street as the camera prepares to cross.

events.description: stopping to look up at the towering skyscrapers with neon advertisements
resuming forward walk after observing the architecture

agents.ego_description: crossing the street and looking up at the massive skyscrapers covered in holographic ads

notable_agents.action: car driving down the street away from camera

entered.detail: twin towers connected by sky bridges with massive vertical digital billboards
yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing markings

segments.scene_description: Crossing the open intersection, the camera pans up to reveal massive skyscrapers covered in bright holographic advertisements and neon cyan lighting. The scale of the futuristic architecture dominates the view before the camera returns to street level to continue walking.

scene_state.functional_zone: palm-lined commercial boulevard with food vendors

events.description: approaching the NCPD checkpoint again from the opposite side of the street
NPC civilian seen looting a blue crate near the NCPD vehicle

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past food vendors and the NCPD checkpoint on the opposite side

notable_agents.action: civilian crouching and looting a blue crate near the NCPD vehicle

entered.detail: red and yellow food vendor stall with illuminated menu and serving window
continuous row of palm trees with uplighting along the street edge
building facade with prominent cyan neon strip lighting along the roofline
same police vehicle now viewed from opposite side of street

segments.scene_description: Walking along the opposite sidewalk lined with palm trees and food stalls, the camera passes the NCPD checkpoint again from the other side of the street. A civilian is seen looting a crate near the police vehicle while other pedestrians walk along the neon-lit boulevard.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-lit commercial district that moves from a sheltered walkway into the vast scale of a futuristic city intersection. It begins along a covered sidewalk lined with glowing yellow vending machines and digital billboards, moving steadily toward an NCPD police vehicle and its surrounding officers. As the camera navigates around orange barriers and passing pedestrians, the scene opens from the covered path onto the open street. The view then pans upward to reveal towering skyscrapers draped in massive holographic advertisements and cyan neon lighting before returning to street level to cross the intersection. Finally, the camera continues along the opposite palm-lined boulevard, passing food stalls and a civilian looting a crate near the police checkpoint.
